facts: Enchem America is located at 648 Hwy 334, Commerce, Ga 30530, Us in Jackson County, Georgia.
The company imports under 19 names and utilizes 66 addresses.
Top imported product categories include organic chemicals, inorganic chemicals, plastics, and miscellaneous chemicals.
HTS Code 2934.99.10 corresponds to the imported product 1,3-Propane Sultone.

Recent sea shipments from Asia to the US Pacific and Transatlantic routes occurred between April 3, 2026, and June 21, 2026.
Shipment weights recorded range from 492 kg to 168,000 kg, utilizing container types such as tanks (tnk), drums (drm), packages (pkg), and cartons (ctn).
Supplier information for Enchem America requires premium access.
Contact phone numbers associated with the company are listed but masked in the provided data.
